title: Shrinathji Temple
tagline: Shrinathji Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Shrinathji Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shrinathji (a form of Krishna) located in Nathdwara.
overview.description: The Shrinathji Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shrinathji (a form of Krishna) located in Nathdwara. It is considered an important pilgrimage centre by Vaishnavas.

topPlaces.name: Nathdwara
topPlaces.description: Nathdwara is a city in the Rajsamand district of the state of Rajasthan, India. It is located in the Aravalli hills, on the banks of the Banas River and is 48 kilometres north-east of Udaipur.

topPlaces.name: Statue of Belief
topPlaces.description: Vishwas Swaroopam (also known as Statue of Belief) is a statue of the Hindu god Shiva constructed at Nathdwara in Rajasthan, India. It opened on 29 October 2022.

topPlaces.name: Madan Paliwal Miraj Sports Centre
topPlaces.description: The Madan Paliwal Miraj Sports Centre (MPMSC) is an international Cricket Stadium located in Nathdwara, Rajasthan, India. Developed by Mr.

items.note: Nathdwara is a city in the Rajsamand district of the state of Rajasthan, India. It is located in the Aravalli hills, on the banks of the Banas River and is 48 kilometres north-east of Udaipur.
Vishwas Swaroopam (also known as Statue of Belief) is a statue of the Hindu god Shiva constructed at Nathdwara in Rajasthan, India. It opened on 29 October 2022.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Madan Paliwal Miraj Sports Centre

items.note: The Madan Paliwal Miraj Sports Centre (MPMSC) is an international Cricket Stadium located in Nathdwara, Rajasthan, India. Developed by Mr.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shrinathji Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shrinathji Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shrinathji Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shrinathji Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shrinathji Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shrinathji Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shrinathji Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shrinathji Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nathdwara, Statue of Belief, Madan Paliwal Miraj Sports Centre.
